concept: Develop a survival game where I'm the last maintenance robot in an abandoned space station experiencing cascading system failures. I must prioritize which systems to repair with limited resources, knowing that some failures will inevitably occur. Each repaired system provides different benefits - life support extends game time, communications might bring rescue, defense systems protect against external threats. My robot gradually develops self-awareness through emergency protocol overrides, raising questions about my purpose once my maintenance directives have been fulfilled.
